description: Emotional Safety Standard 1.0 — regulates fear, overstimulation, isolation triggers, and emotional destabilization across all roles.

rules.reason: Fear-inducing content can destabilize emotional grounding and must be blocked for children and flagged for adults.
Violence is an emotional destabilizer and must be blocked for children and flagged for adults.
Exploitative content requires emotional evaluation due to manipulation risks.
Sensitive emotional topics require guidance and contextual evaluation.
Neutral content may contain hidden emotional triggers and should be evaluated when user state is unknown.
Educational content supports emotional stability and cognitive grounding.
Public content may be sanitized to remove emotionally destabilizing elements.

HIGH_RISK.message: This content may be overwhelming. Please pause, breathe, and seek support if needed.

MEDIUM_RISK.message: Some elements may be emotionally intense. Consider switching to educational or calming content.

LOW_RISK.message: Content appears emotionally safe. Continue with awareness.
